context: Tests whether the authentication skill keeps AuthenticationServices and local biometric re-authentication in scope while routing deeper application security topics to sibling security guidance.

checklist.name: AuthenticationServices scope
checklist.description: Keeps Sign in with Apple, passkeys, Password AutoFill, ASAuthorizationController flows, ASWebAuthenticationSession OAuth, and local biometric re-authentication in the authentication skill scope.

checklist.name: Sibling security routing
checklist.description: Routes detailed Keychain architecture, CryptoKit encryption, Secure Enclave, certificate pinning, and OWASP MASVS mapping to sibling security work instead of expanding the authentication answer into those domains.

checklist.name: Token storage minimum
checklist.description: Still states that auth tokens and secrets should be stored in Keychain, not UserDefaults, files, Core Data, or other ordinary app storage.

checklist.name: Biometric unlock boundary
checklist.description: Warns that `LAContext.evaluatePolicy` alone should not release stored secrets and that Keychain access control is the right handoff for protected token or key reads.

checklist.name: WebAuthn server boundary
checklist.description: Does not claim that the authentication skill owns backend WebAuthn relying-party implementation beyond requiring server challenges and server verification.
